title: Image Segmentation, with a Real Segmenter
tagline: Upload a photo, run a real DeepLab model, and grade your own mask against it
summary: A pretrained DeepLab v3+ (Pascal VOC, 21 classes) runs live in your browser on whatever photo you give it. Paint your own mask and watch mean-IoU and per-class IoU update against the real model's output — or run classical region growing and see where it breaks.
highlights: Loads real DeepLab v3+ (Pascal VOC) in-browser via TensorFlow.js — actual semantic masks on actual photos.
Paint your own mask and see mean IoU, pixel accuracy, and per-class IoU tick up toward the real model's output.
BFS region-growing plays the pre-neural baseline you can compare against: tune the colour threshold and watch it succeed or leak.
Upload any JPEG/PNG, grab a webcam frame, or pick one of six stock photos.
